annotation_policy: CMT and Koenigsbergian annotations derived from MIPVU-reviewed metaphorical and uncertain lexical units. Each instance cites at least one MIPVU ID with decision_type in METAPHOR_DECISIONS.

entailments: political connection with Britain is represented as a binding tie that can be dissolved
Political association is understood through material bonds and dissolution.
cmt.rival_reading: The relation among peoples and states is political, not a literal band or substance.
cmt.justification: MIPVU review rule '' marked 3 unit(s) as metaphor-related or uncertain in this sentence.

entailments: abuses, despotism, and constitutional remedy are represented through procession, subjection, casting off, and guards
Political danger and security are understood through bodily burden, motion, and defense.
cmt.rival_reading: Political oppression and institutional remedies are abstract but are framed through physical subjection and protection.
cmt.justification: MIPVU review rule '' marked 5 unit(s) as metaphor-related or uncertain in this sentence.

entailments: states, powers, and rights are represented as bodies or material entities that can be injured, invaded, annihilated, or exposed
Political rights and institutions are understood through bodily vulnerability.
cmt.rival_reading: Legal-political entities do not literally suffer bodily injury or exposure.
cmt.justification: MIPVU review rule '' marked 1 unit(s) as metaphor-related or uncertain in this sentence.

entailments: states, powers, and rights are represented as bodies or material entities that can be injured, invaded, annihilated, or exposed
Political rights and institutions are understood through bodily vulnerability.
cmt.rival_reading: Legal-political entities do not literally suffer bodily injury or exposure.
cmt.justification: MIPVU review rule '' marked 1 unit(s) as metaphor-related or uncertain in this sentence.

entailments: states, powers, and rights are represented as bodies or material entities that can be injured, invaded, annihilated, or exposed
Political rights and institutions are understood through bodily vulnerability.
cmt.rival_reading: Legal-political entities do not literally suffer bodily injury or exposure.
cmt.justification: MIPVU review rule '' marked 2 unit(s) as metaphor-related or uncertain in this sentence.

entailments: collective commitment is framed through sacred honor, providential protection, and pledged lives and fortunes
Revolutionary commitment is understood through sacred obligation and sacrificial stake.
cmt.rival_reading: The pledge is a real political act, but the closing formula gives it sacred and sacrificial force.
cmt.justification: MIPVU review rule '' marked 1 unit(s) as metaphor-related or uncertain in this sentence.

entailments: royal violence is framed as a work of death and the nation as a civilized body with a head
Enemy violence is understood through death-bearing agency and body-politic hierarchy.
cmt.rival_reading: Military and political actions are represented through bodily death-work and national embodiment.
cmt.justification: MIPVU review rule '' marked 4 unit(s) as metaphor-related or uncertain in this sentence.

instances.span_text: divine / Providence / pledge / Lives / Fortunes / sacred / Honor
